center.name: Lionel Dietrichsen
center.summary: Lionel Dietrichsen是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Purple-crowned lorikeet，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: |year=2024 |title=Glossopsitta porphyrocephala |volume=2024 |article-number=e.T22684658A254009173 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2024-2.RLTS.T22684658A254009173.en |access-date=26 June 2025}} | taxon = Psitteuteles porphyrocephalus | authority = (Dietrichsen, 1837) | range_map = Purple-crowned Lorikeet.png | range_map_caption = Distribution of the purple-crowned lorikeet | synonyms = * Glossopsitta porphyrocephala * Parvipsitta porphyrocephala }} The purple-crowned lorikeet (Psitteuteles porphyrocephalus), (also known as the porphyry-crowned lorikeet, zit parrot, blue-crowned lorikeet, purple-capped lorikeet, lory, cowara, lorikeet, and purple-capped parakeet) is a lorikeet found in scrub and mallee of southern Australia

links.evidence: |year=2024 |title=Glossopsitta porphyrocephala |volume=2024 |article-number=e.T22684658A254009173 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2024-2.RLTS.T22684658A254009173.en |access-date=26 June 2025}} | taxon = Psitteuteles porphyrocephalus | authority = (Dietrichsen, 1837) | range_map = Purple-crowned Lorikeet.png | range_map_caption = Distribution of the purple-crowned lorikeet | synonyms = * Glossopsitta porphyrocephala * Parvipsitta porphyrocephala }} The purple-crowned lorikeet (Psitteuteles porphyrocephalus), (also known as the porphyry-crowned lorikeet, zit parrot, blue-crowned lorikeet, purple-capped lorikeet, lory, cowara, lorikeet, and purple-capped parakeet) is a lorikeet found in scrub and mallee of southern Australia
